metadata.description: On Crumbl, browse the current week's cookie flavors, add a 6-count box (including at least one Chocolate Chip and one Pink Sugar), select delivery, fill in address, and place the order

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On Crumbl, browse the current week's cookie flavors, add a 6-count box (including at least one Chocolate Chip and one Pink Sugar), select delivery, fill in address, and place the order
